title: Centre clears appointment of 3 judicial officers as additional judges of Karnataka High Court
description: The Central government has cleared the appointment of three judicial officers as additional judges of the Karnataka High Court. According to a notification issued on Friday, the President of India has appointed Rajeshwari Narayana Hegde, Kedambadi Ganesh Shanthi and Brungesh Mahadevappa to be additional judges of the High Court.Justice Hegde will serve as a judge till March 17, 2028, when she will attain superannuation.Justices Shanthi and Mahadevappa have been given a two year term as additiona
